_draft_note: PILOT DRAFT — NOT the frozen class table. The real dockerfs3-classes.json freeze is a dated amendment to dockerfs3-prereg.md appended AFTER reviews A/B/C (freeze-order step 7), on full-scale P3 data (60 seqs/image x 12 images), with every OPEN threshold (axis-1 theta1, axis-2/2' prior 0.656, axis-3 sim 0.90, ack) frozen by amendment on that data. This file was produced by benchmarks/class_measure.py over a 4-image / 40-seq/image class pilot to (a) prove the four-axis protocol runs end-to-end on real v3-collected data and (b) surface the honesty structure and threshold-calibration inputs. bench_versions.resolve() must NOT consume this file.

_pilot_provenance.ps_mix: native-ps images (alpine,redis) + ps-less images (debian,fedora) — all via vendored tj3-ps (UD-9)
_pilot_provenance.subset_of: the 12-image mint (dockerfs3-digests.json); NOT the full battery
_pilot_provenance.encoder_actual: e5 (evolve.chunks.perception.enc_e5_base, the frozen production encoder, invoked via --encoder e5). NOTE: class_measure records encoder='custom' whenever it lazily instantiates its own e5 embedder — a metadata-label quirk, not a different encoder; axis-1 top1 columns are the real e5 numbers.
_pilot_provenance.axis4_note: no twin mint collected in this pilot -> axis-4 ceiling defaults to 1.0 (deterministic-by-construction); rule-5 noisy-excluded cannot fire here. Twin determinism is separately covered by DG-3a/b (P1 amendment, twin byte-identity).
